📌 SET BASE CURRENCY FOR UPLOAD
Select the base currency before uploading. For single currency codes (e.g. ZAR, AUD, GBP), every code will be matched against the selected base.
Leave as USD for full pairs (EUR/USD) or USD-base lists.
HOW IT WORKS ▸ THEY PROVIDE: Currency Pair · Rate Description · Tenor · ICE Code
▸ WE RETURN: SEDOL · Rate Type (Spot/Forward/Interest Rate) · Tenor · ICE Code · Status

⌕ SEARCH TAB
Type a currency pair (EUR/USD), single currency (EUR), interest rate fixing (GBP SONIA, USD SOFR), SEDOL or ICE code.
Click any green SEDOL to copy to clipboard.
⬆ BULK LOOKUP TAB
Upload Excel, CSV or TXT. Set base currency first if your file has single CCY codes.
Large files (up to 20,000 rows) are processed in chunks — a progress bar shows status.
